title: Uppercase TRUE/FALSE strings cannot be converted to boolean values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bug_test(a UInt8, b String, c Int32);
INSERT INTO bug_test VALUES (1, 'true', 1), (0, 'false', 0), (NULL, 'TRUE', NULL), (NULL, 'FALSE', NULL);
SELECT * FROM bug_test WHERE a IS NULL OR a = 1;
INSERT INTO bug_test SELECT 1, 'test', 2 UNION ALL SELECT 0, 'example', 3;
key_bug_features: Uppercase TRUE/FALSE strings fail boolean conversion
